---
title: "Tutorials"
---

## Available tutorials

### Statistics

- [Linear Models versus Linear Mixed Models](linear-mixed-models/index.html)
- [Model Sensitivity Analysis with lmer](model-sensitivity/index.html)
- [Model Sensitivity Analysis Parallel](model-sensitivity-parallel/index.html)
- [Outlier identification and treatment](outliers/index.html)

### Coming soon

- Regression diagnostics
- Repeated-measures visualisation
- Model comparison and interpretation
